name: Ribbon Pumpkin Pie with Crunchy Praline Pastr
recipeIngredient: Sugar, for eggs and whipping cream, 1/3 cup
Pumpkin puree or canned pumpkin, 1 1/4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and brown sugar in a saucepan. Cook, stirring until the sugar melts and the mixture bubbles vigorously. Remove from heat, stir in pecans, and spread over the bottom of the pastry shell. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 5 minutes or until bubbly. Remove from oven and cool thoroughly.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water. Beat egg yolks well with 1/3 cup sugar. Add pumpkin, sour cream, salt, pumpkin pie spice, and ginger to the egg yolk mixture. Cook over medium heat just until the mixture comes to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in gelatin until dissolved.
3. Cool the gelatin mixture. Beat egg whites until frothy. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar and continue to beat until stiff peaks form. Fold the egg whites into the pumpkin mixture.
4. Spoon half of the filling into the Crunchy Praline Pastry. Chill until almost set. Whip cream and spread over the pumpkin filling in the pie shell. Top with remaining pumpkin mixture. Chill until almost set and garnish with whipped cream and Lace Cookies, if desired.
(C) 1992 The Los Angeles Times
